user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Heineken
Product type: Silver premium lager
Tone: refreshing, modern, premium
Visual style: Clean, sleek visuals with a bright silver palette emphasizing clarity and sophistication.
Conceptual technique: lifestyle aspiration storytelling

brief.headline: Chill in Silver
brief.caption: A sunlit rooftop scene where a group of young professionals clinks frosty Heineken Silver bottles against a backdrop of a modern city skyline, with the glass catching the light to create a sparkling effect.
brief.visual_style: Clean, sleek visuals with a bright silver palette emphasizing clarity and sophistication.
brief.typography_style: Elegant sans-serif with a sleek, condensed form for a modern feel.
brief.color_scheme: Heineken's iconic green combined with a crisp silver and clear glass white
